public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of apprentice factor in and around Blooming Brazier Workshop, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Blooming Brazier Workshop workable through the obligations of apprentice factor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around Blooming Brazier Workshop, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of apprentice factor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Taren Vale needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Blooming Brazier Workshop before trust collapses.
Taren Vale can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Taren Vale read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Blooming Brazier Workshop: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
